result:
30/30 tests pass. The implementation adds these v2 commands to the existing Racket source:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between two commits (Added/Removed/Modified)
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores files from blob storage, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with 2-space indent
